nodes.standard_name: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
nodes.original_text_name: New Jersey faction of the Lucchese crime family
nodes.context: Powerful crew of Italian-American mobsters operating in Northern New Jersey.
Italian criminal group in Newark led by Stefano Badami in early 1900s.
Italian criminal group in Newark led by Ruggiero Boiardo in early 1900s.
Jewish gang led by Abner Zwillman, controlled bootlegging in Newark's Third Ward.
Sicilian Castellammarese Mafia boss who fought Masseria in the Castellammarese War.
New York City Mafia boss who fought Maranzano in the Castellammarese War.
Mafia family based in Newark, disbanded in 1937.
One of the Five Families of New York, operates in New York and New Jersey.
One of the Five Families of New York, operates in New York and New Jersey.
One of the Five Families of New York, later became the Gambino family.
One of the Five Families of New York, later became the Colombo family.
Mafia family based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
Mafia family based in New Jersey.
A set of the Bloods street gang, involved in drug smuggling.
Major street gang alliance, Nine Trey Gangsters is a set of the Bloods.
One of the Five Families of New York, operates in New York and New Jersey.
One of the Five Families of New York, allied with Lucchese New Jersey faction.

nodes.standard_name: Genovese crime family New Jersey faction
nodes.context: New Jersey faction of the Genovese crime family, allied with Lucchese New Jersey faction.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: The New Jersey faction is a crew within the Lucchese crime family.
The Sicilian and Neapolitan factions were divided and likely rivals in early Newark.
Boiardo's Neapolitan faction fought a violent war with Zwillman's Jewish gang for bootlegging control.
Sicilian boss Badami joined Maranzano's side in the Castellammarese War.
Boiardo formed an alliance with Masseria during the Castellammarese War.
After the Newark family disbanded, many members joined the Gagliano-Lucchese family, forming the Jersey crew.
Profaci family boss Joseph Profaci ordered an assassination attempt on Newark boss D'Amico.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: The Jersey crew absorbed gambling territory from Genovese member Tino Fiumara after his imprisonment.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: The Jersey crew took advantage of the Philadelphia family's power vacuum, leading to terminated cooperation.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: Some Philadelphia members defected to the Jersey crew during the Bruno-Scarfo conflict.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: Joseph Abate maintained close ties to the DeCavalcante family.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.context: Allied to smuggle drugs and cell phones into East Jersey State Prison.
Nine Trey Gangsters is a set of the Bloods.
